metadata.title: Car Mod Visualizer Pricing Plans | CarModSnap
metadata.description: Choose the best CarModSnap plan for AI car rendering, 3D modification previews, and high-quality export credits.

pricing.title: Simple plans for car modification previews
pricing.description: Use credits to generate wrap, wheel, trim, and body-kit concepts. Start monthly, cancel anytime, and upgrade when you need more output.

items.title: Starter
items.description: For trying CarModSnap and generating a small set of visual concepts.
items.tip: Good for testing one vehicle direction.

items.title: Standard
items.description: For comparing multiple build directions before buying parts or booking a shop.
items.label: Popular
items.tip: Best fit for most car owners and enthusiasts.

items.title: Premium
items.description: For shops, creators, and heavy users who need more concepts and commercial usage rights.
features: Commercial usage license for your outputs
Early access to new car-mod workflows
items.tip: Best for wrap shops, content creators, and repeat projects.

feature_comparison.title: Compare what each plan unlocks
feature_comparison.description: All plans use the same core visualizer. Higher tiers add more monthly credits, saved projects, priority generation, and usage rights.

features_detail.title: What your credits are for
features_detail.description: CarModSnap focuses on practical visuals you can use to compare ideas, explain a direction, and talk to a real installer.

features.title: Wrap and paint exploration
features.description: Generate color and finish directions such as gloss, matte, satin, metallic, and chrome-style concepts.

features.title: Wheel and stance ideas
features.description: Preview wheel style direction and overall proportions before buying parts.

features.title: Body and trim direction
features.description: Explore lips, skirts, diffusers, black trim, and other exterior styling ideas.

features.title: Before-after comparisons
features.description: Keep stock and modified views together so the difference is easy to understand.

features.title: Saved concepts
features.description: Store build ideas in your account and return to them when comparing options.

features.title: Shareable outputs
features.description: Download images for personal planning, community feedback, or quote conversations.

features.title: More monthly credits
features.description: Higher tiers give you more room to test variations without stopping mid-project.

features.title: Commercial usage on Premium
features.description: Use your generated outputs in client conversations, marketing drafts, and shop content, subject to the Terms.

features.title: Priority support
features.description: Premium users get priority email help for billing and product questions.

money_back.title: Clear 7-Day Refund Window
money_back.description: First-time charges may be refunded within 7 days if no more than 20% of credits were used.

secure_payment.title: Secure Checkout
secure_payment.description: Payments are handled by Creem or another checkout provider shown before payment.

cancel_anytime.title: Cancel Anytime
cancel_anytime.description: Cancel in Settings > Billing. Access remains until the paid period ends.

instant_access.title: Instant Credit Delivery
instant_access.description: Credits are added after checkout is confirmed by the payment provider.

faq.title: Pricing FAQ
faq.description: Plain answers about credits, renewals, cancellation, and refunds.

items.question: What is a credit?
items.answer: A credit is the unit CarModSnap uses for AI generation. Most car modification preview requests consume credits when a generation is started. The exact cost may vary by workflow and is shown in the product before you generate.

items.question: Do credits roll over?
items.answer: Subscription credits are intended for the current paid period. Monthly credits expire at the end of the monthly period and do not stockpile across renewals.

items.question: Can I cancel anytime?
items.answer: Yes. You can cancel from Settings > Billing. Your plan remains active until the end of the period you already paid for, and it will not renew after that.

items.question: What is your refund policy?
items.answer: First-time paid charges may be eligible for a full refund within 7 calendar days if no more than 20% of the credits from that charge have been used. Renewals and heavily used credit purchases are generally not refundable. See the Refund Policy for details.

items.question: Is payment safe?
items.answer: Checkout is handled by Creem or another payment provider displayed at checkout. Full card details are processed in the provider environment and are not stored on CarModSnap servers.

items.question: Can I use generated images commercially?
items.answer: Premium includes commercial usage rights for outputs you create on CarModSnap, subject to the Terms of Service and any rights held by vehicle manufacturers, brands, or other third parties.
